core_responsibility: Provides the PlayKit JS Share UI plugin that adds share actions and an overlay (including embed and clip options) to the Kaltura Player JS experience.

feature_ownership: Share button integration in player upper bar / audio UI
Share overlay UI with social network buttons
Embed code generation and embed options screen
Video start-from and clip time selection
Native share invocation via Web Share API
data_handling: Plugin configuration: shareUrl, embedUrl, shareOptions, enableTimeOffset, enableClipping, useNative
Kaltura embed template variables (embedBaseUrl, partnerId, uiConfId, entryId)
Player state for play/pause and duration
Overlay state: selected clipping option, start time, clip start/end times, embed template/url
Share URL query params (kalturaStartTime, kalturaSeekFrom, kalturaClipTo)

upstream: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js core player instance and UI services
Player configuration and metadata supplied by host applications
downstream: Kaltura Player JS UI presets and overlays
Host applications that bundle the @playkit-js/share plugin
